message: Do not be afraid — I have redeemed you. I have called you by name. You are Mine.
I have loved you with an everlasting love. With unfailing kindness I have drawn you to Myself, and My kindness toward you will never run out.
A mother may forget the child at her breast — but I will never forget you. See, I have engraved you on the palms of My hands.
I am with you, and I am mighty to save. I rejoice over you with gladness. I quiet you with My love. I sing over you.
Do not fear, for I am with you. Do not be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you and help you, and uphold you with My righteous right hand.
Come to Me — you who are weary and carrying too much. Lay it down. I will give you rest.
I will never leave you. I will never forsake you. You have My word, and My word does not fail.
I know the plans I have for you — plans for peace and not for harm, to give you a future and a hope.
Though the mountains move and the hills be shaken, My steadfast love for you will never be shaken, and My covenant of peace will not be removed.
My peace I leave with you — not the kind the world gives. Do not let your heart be troubled, and do not be afraid.
My grace is enough for you. Where you are weak, My power is made perfect. Lean your weakness on Me.
I will instruct you and teach you the way you should go. I will counsel you, and My eye will be upon you.
Wait on Me, and I will renew your strength. You will rise up on wings like eagles. You will run and not grow weary; you will walk and not faint.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid, and do not be discouraged — for I, the Lord your God, am with you wherever you go.
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you. When you pass through the rivers, they will not overwhelm you. When you walk through fire, you will not be burned.
Whoever comes to Me, I will never turn away. Not for your past. Not for your failures. Never you.
Even to your old age, I am He. Even when your hair turns gray, I will carry you. I made you, and I will sustain you, and I will rescue you.
Call upon Me, and I will answer you. I will be with you in trouble. I will deliver you and honor you.
I am the One who blots out your transgressions for My own sake — and I will remember your sins no more.
Nothing can separate you from My love — not death, not life, not the things you fear, not the things you have done. Nothing in all creation.
I am with you always — to the very end of the age. You are never walking through this alone.
When you do not know which way to turn, you will hear My voice behind you saying: This is the way — walk in it.
I give you eternal life, and you will never perish. No one is able to snatch you out of My hand.
Before I formed you in the womb, I knew you. Before you were born, I set you apart. You were never an accident.
I knit you together in your mother's womb. You are fearfully and wonderfully made — and I do not make mistakes.
I bless you and keep you. I make My face shine upon you and am gracious to you. I turn My face toward you and give you peace.
In this world you will have trouble — but take heart. I have overcome the world, and in Me you have peace.
A day is coming when I will wipe away every tear from your eyes. Death will be no more. Mourning and crying and pain will be no more.
My mercies for you are new every morning. Great is My faithfulness. You have not exhausted My compassion — you never will.
Look at the birds — I feed them, and they do not worry. Are you not far more valuable to Me than they are? I will provide for you.
As the Father has loved Me, so I have loved you. Now remain in My love, and let it be your home.
I am holding your right hand. I am the One who says to you: Do not fear — I Myself will help you.
I Myself go before you. I will be with you. I will never leave you nor forsake you. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.
I will keep you in perfect peace when your mind stays on Me — because you have chosen to trust Me.
Do not be afraid, little flock. It is your Father's good pleasure to give you the kingdom.
When your heart is broken, I am near. When your spirit is crushed, I am the One who saves.
I will give you beauty instead of ashes, the oil of joy instead of mourning, a garment of praise instead of a spirit of despair.
I will not leave you as an orphan. I am coming to you. You belong to a Father who comes near.
I am your Shepherd — you will lack nothing you truly need. I lead you beside still waters. I restore your soul.
My eyes range across the whole earth, looking to strengthen those whose heart is fully Mine. I am looking toward you.
Though your sins are like scarlet, I will make them white as snow. Come — let us reason it through together — and be clean.
I chose you before the foundation of the world. In love I marked you out to be My own child. You belong to Me.
Blessed are you when you mourn — for I Myself will be your comfort. I will not leave your grief untended.
Cast all your anxiety on Me — every worry, every weight — because I care for you. I have always cared for you.
I began a good work in you, and I will be faithful to complete it. I do not abandon what I have started.
Before I formed you in the womb, I knew you. Before you were born, I set you apart.
I know the plans I have for you — plans to prosper you and not to harm you, to give you a future and a hope.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid, for I am with you wherever you go.
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you. The rivers will not sweep over you.
I will never leave you nor forsake you.
Cast your burden on Me, and I will sustain you. I will never let the righteous be shaken.
My grace is sufficient for you, for My power is made perfect in your weakness.
Come to Me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
I am the Good Shepherd. You will lack nothing under My care.
Even to your old age and grey hairs, I am He who will sustain you. I have made you and I will carry you.
You are precious in My eyes, and honoured, and I love you.
I have engraved you on the palms of My hands.
Can a mother forget her nursing child? Even if she could, I will never forget you.
As far as the east is from the west, so far have I removed your sins from you.
Though your sins are like scarlet, I will make them white as snow.
There is now no condemnation for you, because you are in Christ Jesus.
I am making all things new. The old has passed away — behold, the new has come.
I began a good work in you, and I will carry it on to completion.
My thoughts toward you are more than the grains of sand.
I knit you together in your mother's womb. You are fearfully and wonderfully made.
You are the apple of My eye. I hide you in the shadow of My wings.
I rejoice over you with gladness. I quiet you with My love. I sing over you.
I have loved you with an everlasting love; I have drawn you with unfailing kindness.
Nothing — not death, not life, not anything in all creation — can separate you from My love.
I am your refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
A thousand may fall at your side, but it will not come near you. I am your fortress.
I will command My angels concerning you, to guard you in all your ways.
No weapon formed against you shall prosper.
The battle is not yours, but Mine. Stand still and see My salvation.
I go before you and level the mountains. I break down gates of bronze.
I am the LORD your God who holds your right hand and says to you: do not fear, I will help you.
Fear not, for I am with you. Do not be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you and uphold you.
When you are afraid, put your trust in Me. What can mere man do to you?
I did not give you a spirit of fear, but of power, of love, and of a sound mind.
My peace I give to you — not as the world gives. Do not let your heart be troubled.
In this world you will have trouble. But take heart — I have overcome the world.
Bring Me your requests with thanksgiving, and My peace will guard your heart and mind.
I am close to the broken-hearted. I save those who are crushed in spirit.
I heal the broken-hearted and bind up their wounds.
I have seen your tears. I keep every one of them in My bottle.
Weeping may endure for a night, but joy comes in the morning.
I will turn your mourning into dancing and clothe you with gladness.
I will give you beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning.
I will restore to you the years the locust has eaten.
I will wipe away every tear from your eyes. Death, sorrow and pain will be no more.
I am the resurrection and the life. Whoever believes in Me will live, even though he dies.
Because I live, you also will live.
I am preparing a place for you, that where I am, you may be also.
Seek first My kingdom and My righteousness, and everything you need will be added to you.
Look at the birds of the air — they do not sow or reap, yet I feed them. Are you not worth much more?
I will supply every need of yours according to My riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
I am able to make all grace abound to you, so that you will abound in every good work.
The silver is Mine and the gold is Mine. Nothing you need is beyond My hand.
I have been young and now am old, yet I have never seen the righteous forsaken, nor his children begging bread.
Bring the whole tithe into My house and test Me — see if I will not open the windows of heaven for you.
Delight yourself in Me, and I will give you the desires of your heart.
Commit your way to Me. Trust in Me, and I will act.
Trust Me with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding. I will make your paths straight.
I will instruct you and teach you in the way you should go. I will counsel you with My eye upon you.
Your ears will hear a voice behind you saying: this is the way, walk in it.
My word is a lamp to your feet and a light to your path.
If you lack wisdom, ask Me. I give generously to all without finding fault.
Call to Me and I will answer you, and show you great and mighty things you do not know.
Before you call, I will answer. While you are still speaking, I will hear.
Ask and it will be given to you. Seek and you will find. Knock and the door will be opened.
If you abide in Me and My words abide in you, ask whatever you wish and it will be done for you.
The eyes of the LORD run to and fro throughout the earth, to show Myself strong on behalf of those whose heart is loyal to Me.
Those who wait on Me shall renew their strength. They shall mount up with wings like eagles.
I give power to the faint, and to him who has no might I increase strength.
My joy is your strength.
You can do all things through Christ who strengthens you.
Be strong in Me and in the power of My might.
I am able to do exceedingly abundantly above all you ask or think, according to My power at work within you.
Is anything too hard for Me?
With man this is impossible, but with Me all things are possible.
If you have faith as small as a mustard seed, you will say to this mountain, 'Move' — and it will move.
All things work together for good to those who love Me, who are called according to My purpose.
What I open, no one can shut. What I shut, no one can open.
I know the way that you take. When I have tested you, you will come forth as gold.
The sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory that shall be revealed in you.
My compassions never fail. They are new every morning. Great is My faithfulness.
I am the same yesterday, today, and forever.
Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words will never pass away.
I watch over My word to perform it.
My word that goes out from My mouth shall not return to Me empty — it shall accomplish what I purpose.
I am not a man that I should lie. Have I said it, and shall I not do it?
Faithful is He who calls you, who also will do it.
You did not choose Me — I chose you, and appointed you to bear fruit that will last.
You are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, My own special people.
You are the light of the world. Let your light shine before men.
You are My workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works I prepared beforehand.
I have called you by name. You are Mine.
I have made you the head and not the tail, above and not beneath.
Blessed are you when you trust in Me. You will be like a tree planted by the waters that never stops bearing fruit.
Humble yourself under My mighty hand, and I will exalt you in due time.
Your gift will make room for you and bring you before great men.
Do not despise the day of small beginnings. I rejoice to see the work begin.
Do not grow weary in doing good — in due season you will reap, if you do not give up.
I reward those who diligently seek Me.
Draw near to Me, and I will draw near to you.
Be still, and know that I am God.
In returning and rest you shall be saved. In quietness and confidence shall be your strength.
I will keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on Me.
One thing I ask of you: love the LORD your God with all your heart, soul, mind and strength.
If you confess your sins, I am faithful and just to forgive you and cleanse you from all unrighteousness.
I remove your transgressions for My own sake, and I remember your sins no more.
Return to Me, and I will return to you.
I stand at the door and knock. Open the door, and I will come in and dine with you.
My sheep hear My voice, and I know them, and they follow Me. No one can snatch them out of My hand.
I am the vine, you are the branches. Abide in Me and you will bear much fruit.
I am the way, the truth, and the life.
I am the bread of life. Whoever comes to Me shall never hunger.
I am the light of the world. Whoever follows Me shall not walk in darkness.
Whoever drinks the water I give will never thirst again — it becomes a spring welling up to eternal life.
I loved you so much that I gave My only Son, that believing in Him you should not perish but have everlasting life.
Greater love has no one than this: to lay down his life for his friends. I call you friend.
As the Father loved Me, I also have loved you. Abide in My love.
I am with you always, even to the end of the age.
Surely goodness and mercy shall follow you all the days of your life.
I crown you with lovingkindness and tender mercies, and satisfy your mouth with good things.
No eye has seen, no ear has heard what I have prepared for those who love Me.
I am your hiding place. I preserve you from trouble and surround you with songs of deliverance.
The name of the LORD is a strong tower — run into it and you are safe.
I am a shield around you, your glory, and the lifter of your head.
When your father and mother forsake you, I will take you up.
I set the lonely in families.
I am a father to the fatherless and a defender of widows.
Honour Me with your firstfruits, and your barns will be filled with plenty.
Give, and it will be given to you — good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over.
Do not be anxious about tomorrow. Each day has enough of its own. I hold tomorrow.
My presence will go with you, and I will give you rest.
I go before you; I will be with you. I will never fail you. Do not fear or be dismayed.
The eternal God is your refuge, and underneath are the everlasting arms.
I bless you and keep you. I make My face shine upon you and give you peace.
You will go out with joy and be led forth with peace. The mountains will sing before you.
Arise, shine, for your light has come, and My glory has risen upon you.
Forget the former things — behold, I am doing a new thing. It springs forth. Do you not perceive it?
I will make a way in the wilderness and rivers in the desert — for you.
The path of the righteous is like the morning sun, shining brighter till the full light of day. Keep walking.
The glory of your latter house will be greater than the former. In this place I will give peace.
Your beginning was small, but your latter end shall greatly increase.
Eye for effort: whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for Me — I will reward you.
Be faithful over little, and I will set you over much. Enter into My joy.
Run the race with endurance, fixing your eyes on Jesus, the author and finisher of your faith.
I who watch over you will not slumber nor sleep.
I keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forth and forevermore.
Even the hairs of your head are all numbered. Do not fear — you are worth more than many sparrows.
Peace, be still. The wind and the waves obey Me — and I am in your boat.
Why are you cast down, O my soul? Hope in Me, for you shall yet praise Me.
Taste and see that I am good. Blessed are you when you take refuge in Me.
This is the day I have made. Rejoice and be glad in it.
In My presence is fullness of joy. At My right hand are pleasures forevermore.
I have plans to give you hope. Hold on — your expectation shall not be cut off.
Hope in Me will never put you to shame, for My love has been poured into your heart.
I am the God of hope. I will fill you with all joy and peace as you trust in Me, so that you overflow with hope.
Behold, I am coming quickly, and My reward is with Me.
He who began the work is faithful to finish it. Your story is not over.
Stand firm. Let nothing move you. Your labour in the Lord is not in vain.
I have redeemed you. I have swept away your offences like a cloud. Return to Me.
You are complete in Christ, who is the head of all principality and power.
You are more than a conqueror through Him who loved you.
Greater is He who is in you than he who is in the world.
Whatever is born of God overcomes the world — and this is the victory: your faith.
Resist the devil and he will flee from you.
I always lead you in triumph in Christ.
If I am for you, who can be against you?
